## Summary

Describe the change clearly.

## Type of change

- [ ] Source skill content
- [ ] Exporter change
- [ ] Installer change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Template / starter code change
- [ ] GitHub / repo meta change

## Source-of-truth check

- [ ] I updated `skills/qml/` first when the change affected skill content
- [ ] I did not manually edit generated export output unless explicitly required
- [ ] I kept skill names lowercase and hyphen-separated where relevant
- [ ] I updated frontmatter metadata if the skill meaning changed

## Validation

- [ ] I read back modified markdown docs
- [ ] I ran Python diagnostics on changed installer/exporter code when applicable
- [ ] I verified generated/exported output still matches the documented behavior when applicable

## Affected files

List the main files or directories changed.

## Notes

Add any reviewer context, tradeoffs, or follow-up work.
